notes: Recognizable as the same squid pose with correct mantle/fin/two-tentacle/arm-fan arrangement, but execution reads as a noisy raw edge-trace rather than a disciplined FAO plate.
specific_issues: jaggy double-line edge-trace artifacts along the entire silhouette
stipple is scattered random noise, not controlled chromatophore shading
upper tentacle reads as a rigid blade attached to the mantle instead of the photo's free-curving tentacle arc
no ring suckers indicated on any arms or tentacle clubs
eye is a tiny dot rather than an almond with a filled pupil
individual arms in the right-side fan are not cleanly separated — they blur into a single jagged mass
lower tentacle silhouette is broken/thinned with edge-trace gaps
fin shape is over-rounded and lacks the clean triangular rhomboid of the photo and FAO plates
overall reads as automated photo edge-detection rather than scientific line drawing
